ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Salary of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team (e.g., okc, nor, hou) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  "arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game (e.g., 132-126) */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular, playoff) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the game was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game log */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the log is for */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the log is for */,
  "minutes" TEXT /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds grabbed by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the player */,
  "fg_attempts" INTEGER /* Field goal attempts by the player */,
  "fg_made" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player */,
  "fg_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_pt_attempts" INTEGER /* Three-point attempts by the player */,
  "three_pt_made" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made by the player */,
  "three_pt_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "ft_attempts" INTEGER /* Free throw attempts by the player */,
  "ft_made" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the player */,
  "ft_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic is for */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "points" REAL /* Points per game averaged by the player */,
  "rebounds" REAL /* Rebounds per game averaged by the player */,
  "assists" REAL /* Assists per game averaged by the player */,
  "steals" REAL /* Steals per game averaged by the player */,
  "blocks" REAL /* Blocks per game averaged by the player */,
  "turnovers" REAL /* Turnovers per game averaged by the player */,
  "fg_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_pt_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "ft_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams_players" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the team-player association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "player_id", "season")
)

CREATE TABLE "games_teams" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Whether the team was home or away */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "accessed_table" TEXT /* Table accessed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions_statistics" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position */,
  "games_played" REAL /* Average games played per season for the position */,
  "points" REAL /* Average points per game for the position */,
  "rebounds" REAL /* Average rebounds per game for the position */,
  "assists" REAL /* Average assists per game for the position */,
  "steals" REAL /* Average steals per game for the position */,
  "blocks" REAL /* Average blocks per game for the position */,
  "turnovers" REAL /* Average turnovers per game for the position */,
  "fg_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_pt_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "ft_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams_statistics" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "games_played" REAL /* Average games played per season for the team */,
  "points" REAL /* Average points per game for the team */,
  "rebounds" REAL /* Average rebounds per game for the team */,
  "assists" REAL /* Average assists per game for the team */,
  "steals" REAL /* Average steals per game for the team */,
  "blocks" REAL /* Average blocks per game for the team */,
  "turnovers" REAL /* Average turnovers per game for the team */,
  "fg_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_pt_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "ft_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players_statistics" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "games_played" REAL /* Average games played per season for the player */,
  "points" REAL /* Average points per game for the player */,
  "rebounds" REAL /* Average rebounds per game for the player */,
  "assists" REAL /* Average assists per game for the player */,
  "steals" REAL /* Average steals per game for the player */,
  "blocks" REAL /* Average blocks per game for the player */,
  "turnovers" REAL /* Average turnovers per game for the player */,
  "fg_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_pt_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "ft_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who sustained the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
